title: Trash Compactor
description: Transform your unwanted items into valuable XP with the Trash Compactor!
body:
**Description**
---
Transform your unwanted items into valuable XP with the Trash Compactor! This convenient utility allows you to convert junk or excess items into XP, giving you a reason to no longer throw them away into lava pits!


**How It Works**
---
As items are compacted, the internal XP container of the Trash Compactor will continue to fill, until a maximum limit has been reached (64). XP from the container can only be transferred to empty bottles, which are then filled to provide an output of a Bottle o' Enchanting. All items are currently treated equally in terms of the XP output they provide.

![Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab14724dcf1d8a3a81055df39f289fc4a6aee862.png)


**Unsupported Blocks**
---
The following blocks that cannot be compacted are:

- Any blocks with tile/block entities
- Bottle o' Enchanting


**Hoppers/Capability Usage**
---
- **Top:** Compactable Item Input
- **Front:** Empty Bottle Input
- **Sides:** Fuel Input
- **Bottom:** Result Output
